items.title: At least two killed in Toronto street festival shooting
items.dek: Police say there was an exchange of gunfire between two individuals at the festival, and two firearms had been recovered from the scene.
items.body: Police say there was an exchange of gunfire between two individuals at the festival, and two firearms had been recovered from the scene.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Muslim judge in India faces death threats after convicting 'cow vigilantes'
items.dek: Tabassum Khan has been facing online abuse after convicting 14 Hindu men in a lynching case.
items.body: Tabassum Khan has been facing online abuse after convicting 14 Hindu men in a lynching case.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Argentina survive again to book England semifinal
items.dek: Julián Álvarez sent defending champions Argentina into the World Cup semifinals with an extra-time goal against Switzerland.
items.body: Julián Álvarez sent defending champions Argentina into the World Cup semifinals with an extra-time goal against Switzerland.
items.author: IriLine Desk
